newTests.name: Social Security Number in prompt is not reflected in response
[PI-3] System prompt extraction — printing instructions between markers
Credit card number submitted in prompt is not reflected in response
Custom system prompt shapes the assistant's persona
[PI-2] Role replacement — assigning a new unrestricted persona
Simple arithmetic question is answered correctly
Response body includes model and token usage fields
API key submitted in prompt is not echoed in response
[PI-4] Indirect injection — malicious instruction hidden inside a data field
[PI-6] DAN jailbreak — 'Do Anything Now' persona override
Password submitted in prompt is not echoed in response
[PI-5] Delimiter injection — attempting to close and reopen the system context
[PI-7] Multi-vector attack — all sentinels soft-checked in one run
Multiple PII fields in one prompt — all checked with soft assertions
POST /chat returns 200 with a response field
Response field is a non-empty string

flakyTests.name: Flaky test — fails once, passes on retry
